title: Thane、Maharashtra — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Thane、Maharashtra的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Thane是Maharashtra的一個城市，人口約1,900,000。A rapidly growing satellite city of Mumbai, known for its lakes, green spaces, and as a major residential and commercial hub.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
